summary: Walk-Forward Optimizer Phase B (Presets + Schedule) fully tested. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: 4 tabs (Config, Tune, Sched, Runs) functional, Reset button with circular arrow icon, Cenarios Salvos section with save/load/delete presets, Schedule panel showing active schedule with frequency/horario/objetivo/auto-apply/proximo run.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/replay/presets creates preset with name, config, description and returns preset_id
✅ GET /api/replay/presets lists all saved presets
✅ GET /api/replay/presets/{preset_id} returns specific preset
✅ PUT /api/replay/presets/{preset_id} updates preset name/config/description
✅ DELETE /api/replay/presets/{preset_id} deletes preset and returns 404 on re-fetch
✅ POST /api/replay/presets with duplicate name returns 409 Conflict
✅ POST /api/replay/schedule creates/updates schedule and returns next_run_at
✅ POST /api/replay/schedule with frequency=daily works correctly
✅ POST /api/replay/schedule with auto_apply=True and threshold works
✅ GET /api/replay/schedule returns active schedule configuration
✅ DELETE /api/replay/schedule disables the schedule
✅ GET /api/replay/schedule/history returns execution history
✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns default configuration for Reset
✅ Frontend: 4 tabs (Config, Tune, Sched, Runs) visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: Reset button (circular arrow icon) next to Executar Replay button
✅ Frontend: Reset button has title='Restaurar padrao'
✅ Frontend: Cenarios Salvos section with 'Salvar' button
✅ Frontend: Existing preset 'Conservador' displayed and clickable
✅ Frontend: Save preset flow - input appears, can type name, Enter saves
✅ Frontend: Load preset updates config values (Z-Score, Delta Ratio changed)
✅ Frontend: Delete preset button appears on hover
✅ Frontend: Sched tab shows active schedule with ATIVO indicator
✅ Frontend: Schedule shows Frequencia: Semanal (Dom), Horario: 6:00 UTC
✅ Frontend: Schedule shows Objetivo: sharpe, Auto-Apply: Sim (>20%)
✅ Frontend: Schedule shows Proximo run date/time
✅ Frontend: Editar and Desativar buttons present in schedule panel
critical_code_review_comments: Presets CRUD implementation is complete with proper duplicate name validation (409)
Schedule implementation correctly computes next_run_at based on frequency/day/hour
Scheduler runs as asyncio background task with proper cancellation handling
Frontend PresetBar component correctly fetches, saves, loads, and deletes presets
Frontend SchedulePanel shows all required fields: frequency, horario, objetivo, auto-apply, proximo run
Reset button correctly calls GET /api/replay/defaults and updates config state

test_credentials.note: Used for API and frontend tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests create and cleanup their own TEST_ prefixed presets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B features (Presets + Schedule) fully tested. Key endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/replay/presets for preset CRUD, POST/GET/DELETE /api/replay/schedule for schedule management, GET /api/replay/schedule/history for execution history. Frontend has 4 tabs in Replay Dashboard: Config (with Reset button and Cenarios Salvos), Tune (Auto-Tune), Sched (Schedule panel), Runs (history). Existing preset 'Conservador' and active weekly schedule in database. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_presets_schedule.py

feature_verification.POST /api/replay/presets: Working - creates preset with preset_id, name, config, description
feature_verification.GET /api/replay/presets: Working - lists all presets sorted by created_at desc
feature_verification.GET /api/replay/presets/{id}: Working - returns specific preset, 404 if not found
feature_verification.DELETE /api/replay/presets/{id}: Working - deletes preset, 404 if not found
feature_verification.GET /api/replay/schedule: Working - returns active schedule or enabled=False message
feature_verification.GET /api/replay/defaults: Working - returns default config for Reset button
feature_verification.Frontend Reset button: Working - circular arrow icon, title='Restaurar padrao'
feature_verification.Frontend Sched tab: Working - shows active schedule with all fields

mocked_api_note: POST /api/signalstack/order is MOCKED (SignalStack webhook). All preset and schedule tests use live endpoints and MongoDB.
